notes: External tooling/code intelligence sources tracked for RouterXPL-Forge roadmap and test coverage.

sources.name: Local mirror of third-party-router-poc clones (all slugs)
sources.notes: Full tree mirrored from sibling checkout; excludes .git only. Re-run tool after submodule updates. Includes ExploitDB text + bin-sploits copies for offline use; respect upstream licenses (GPLv2 Exploit-DB, etc.).

sources.name: PRG EAV4202N default WPA algorithm research
RouterPWN (SOHO router exploits, generators, advisories)
sources.notes: Third-party one-click exploit index; triage license/ethics before porting payloads; prefer lab-validated modules.

sources.name: RouterPWN — Internet Archive (Wayback) catch-all
sources.notes: Historical snapshots for recovered PoC links and vendor-specific pages when the live site changes.

sources.name: hkm/routerpwn.com (static mirror / offline bundle)
sources.notes: Bundled under arsenal/pocs; served locally via scanners/misc/soho_exploit_catalog_server.py; key algorithms in routerxpl/core/soho_exploit_catalog.py.

sources.name: Exploit-DB — hardware / router vendor search
sources.notes: Curate per-vendor queries (e.g. Intelbras, Mercusys); do not bulk-import copyrighted exploit text without review.

sources.name: Community Intelbras router vuln checklist (gist)
sources.notes: Cross-check CVEs and EDB IDs against cve_extended_catalog before module design.

sources.name: Metasploit Framework (Rapid7) — upstream source
sources.notes: RouterXPL: generic/external/metasploit_console_bridge.py invokes local msfconsole; do not strip BSD license from MSF tree.

sources.name: Exploit-DB (OffSec) — upstream reference
sources.notes: Cópia em incorporated_third_party/exploit-database__exploitdb (+ bin-sploits); pesquisa offline: generic/external/exploitdb_embedded_lookup.py. Sem integração com binário searchsploit. GPLv2 nos textos/scripts upstream.

sources.name: Bitbucket search — router / firmware / exploit keywords
sources.notes: Refine query per vendor (e.g. +intelbras, +openwrt); verify repo license before reuse.

sources.name: hkm__routerpwn.com (clone local PoC)
sources.notes: Cópia funcional embarcada no pacote (arsenal/pocs/soho_exploit_catalog); repositório submodule permanece opcional para desenvolvimento.
